metaDescription: Outsourced senior accountant for US and Canadian companies. A qualified senior accountant embedded full-time to own your GL, reconciliations, and books.

hero.lede: An outsourced senior accountant is a qualified finance professional who owns your general ledger, reconciliations, and month-end production work. Satinwood Talent embeds one full-time and exclusively in your business, at a fraction of the cost of a local hire.
hero.credLine: Serving the US and Canada · CA Sri Lanka, ACCA, CIMA qualified

atAGlance.v: A fraction of a local hire

work.title: What an outsourced senior accountant does.
work.lede: A senior accountant owns the accuracy and integrity of your books, the production work that makes everything else possible. A Satinwood Talent operator handles the following inside your own tools.

items.title: General ledger
items.body: Owns the GL, posting journal entries, accruals, prepayments, and adjustments so the books always reflect reality.

items.title: Bank reconciliations
items.body: Reconciles every account monthly so the books tie out to the bank and nothing is missed.

items.title: AP and AR support
items.body: Codes, processes, and tracks payables and receivables to keep the function running cleanly and on time.

items.title: Month-end production
items.body: Runs the production work that closes the books, from reconciliations to the trial balance, so the controller can report.

items.title: Fixed assets and depreciation
items.body: Maintains the fixed asset register and posts depreciation accurately so the balance sheet stays clean.

items.title: Audit-ready workpapers
items.body: Keeps the files, schedules, and reconciliations organised so audits and investor reviews do not become a scramble.

why.title: Senior, qualified, and dedicated to your books.

items.title: Always senior
items.body: CA Sri Lanka, ACCA, or CIMA qualified. Big Four and listed-group trained. Not a junior clerk with a senior title.

items.title: Dedicated to you
items.body: Full-time and exclusive to your business, embedded in your tools and your close cadence. Not a shared bookkeeping pool.

items.title: Finance only
items.body: We place finance and nothing else. Every operator is vetted to a single, finance-only standard.

items.title: A fraction of the cost
items.body: The qualification and ownership of a local senior accountant, for far less, because the talent sits in a lower-cost market.

compare.titleEm: at a fraction of the cost.

rows.label: Relative cost
rows.sat: A fraction of a local hire

whoFor.title: Built for growing US and Canadian companies.

items.title: Your first proper hire
items.body: You have outgrown spreadsheets and a part-time bookkeeper and need someone who can own the books to a real standard.

items.title: Supporting a controller or CFO
items.body: Your controller needs a qualified operator to handle the production work so they can focus on reporting and controls.

items.title: Getting books investor-ready
items.body: You need clean, reconciled books and organised workpapers before a raise or audit, and you need them handled properly.

items.title: Replacing a departing accountant
items.body: Someone left and the close cannot wait two or three months for a local hire to go through the full hiring process.

items.q: What is an outsourced senior accountant?
items.a: An outsourced senior accountant is a qualified finance professional who owns your general ledger, reconciliations, and month-end production work from outside your local payroll. Satinwood Talent embeds one full-time and exclusively in your business, at a standard that holds up to audit and investor review, at a fraction of the cost of a local hire.

items.q: What does a senior accountant do, compared with a bookkeeper?
items.a: A bookkeeper records transactions. A senior accountant owns the integrity of the books. That means owning the GL, posting adjusting entries and accruals, reconciling every account, preparing audit-ready workpapers, and making sure the books are clean and accurate at month-end. Satinwood Talent places senior accountant level talent, not bookkeeping.

items.q: What qualifications do Satinwood Talent's senior accountants hold?
items.a: CA Sri Lanka, ACCA, or CIMA qualified, with experience inside global firms, Big Four, and listed groups. These are the same credentials global firms recruit from Sri Lanka's internationally recognised finance profession.

items.q: What is the difference between a senior accountant and an accounting manager?
items.a: A senior accountant owns the production work, the GL, reconciliations, journal entries, and workpapers. An accounting manager also owns the production work but adds management of the close process, AP and AR oversight, and coordination of the finance function. Satinwood Talent places both at the same senior standard.

items.q: Can an offshore senior accountant own our GL and reconciliations?
items.a: Yes. A qualified offshore senior accountant can own your GL, bank reconciliations, journal entries, and month-end production work, inside your own tools, with hours that overlap your day.

items.q: Is the senior accountant dedicated and full-time, or shared?
items.a: Dedicated, full-time, and exclusive to your business. Not a shared bookkeeping pool, not a marketplace match, not a task queue.

items.q: How much does an outsourced senior accountant cost compared with a local hire?
items.a: A fraction of a local senior accountant, who in the US or Canada typically costs well into six figures with benefits and payroll taxes. You get the same qualification and ownership for far less, because the talent sits in a lower-cost market, not because the work is junior.

items.q: Do you work with US and Canadian companies?
items.a: Yes. Satinwood Talent serves growing companies across the United States and Canada, as well as the United Kingdom, the United Arab Emirates, and Australia. Operators work hours that overlap your day, agreed up front.

items.q: How fast can you place a senior accountant, and is there a trial?
items.a: About two weeks from the first call to a hand-selected match. Every match starts on a trial to confirm fit, and if it is not right we replace it. Terms are flexible and rolling, with no long lock-in.

items.q: How is our financial data handled?
items.a: Secure, company-issued devices, signed NDAs, role-based access, and documented handling standards. Your financial data is treated as if our own books depended on it.

cta.title: Get a qualified senior accountant, embedded.
